adversarial_code:
module TopModule (
    input [15:0] I,
    output reg [3:0] O
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (I == 16'b0) begin
            O = 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            for (integer i = 15; i >= 0; i--) begin
                if (I[i] == 1'b1) begin
                    O = i;
                    break;
                end
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
